name: Lamayuru Monastery (Moonland)
description: One of the oldest and largest monasteries in Ladakh, famous for its surreal, cratered 'Moonland' landscape that surrounds the complex.
history: According to legend, the great Indian scholar Naropa dried up a lake here to found the monastery in the 11th century.
famousFor: Moon-like crater landscapes, ancient frescoes, Yuru Kabgyat festival.
